TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Nigeria a Federal Republic e Nigeria, pu West Africa. A nanu no Sahel tu north e Gulf of Guinea tu south. A tomom e 923,769 square kilometres. A pakaw tu 230 million a san a populous tu Africa, e sixth-most populous tu world. A nono Niger tu north, Chad tu northeast, Cameroon tu east, e Benin tu west. Nigeria e federal republic a tomom e 36 states e Federal Capital Territory, a nanu Abuja. A tayal a nanu Lagos, a largest city tu Nigeria e a largest metropolitan area tu Africa.
S.PHON: nig…ôria a *…ôd…ôra…≠ r…ôpub…≠i ¶ …ô nig…ôria, pu w…ôst a*ri ¶a. a nanu nu sah…ô…≠ tu nurth …ô gu…≠* u* guin…ôa tu suuth. a tumum …ô ***,*** squar…ô ki…≠um…ôtr…ôs. a pakaw tu *** mi…≠…≠iun a san a pupu…≠uus tu a*ri ¶a, …ô si*th-must pupu…≠uus tu wur…≠d. a nunu nig…ôr tu nurth, ¶had tu nurth…ôast, ¶am…ôruun tu …ôast, …ô b…ônin tu w…ôst. nig…ôria …ô *…ôd…ôra…≠ r…ôpub…≠i ¶ a tumum …ô ** stat…ôs …ô *…ôd…ôra…≠ ¶apita…≠ t…ôrriturj, a nanu abuja. a taja…≠ a nanu …≠agus, a …≠arg…ôst ¶itj tu nig…ôria …ô a …≠arg…ôst m…ôtrupu…≠itan ar…ôa tu a*ri ¶a.
S.FORM: Nigeria a Federal Republic e Nigeria, pu West Africa. A nanu no Sahel tu north e Gulf of Guinea tu south. A tomom e 923,769 square kilometres. A pakaw tu 230 million a san a populous tu Africa, e sixth-most populous tu world. A nono Niger tu north, Chad tu northeast, Cameroon tu east, e Benin tu west. Nigeria e federal republic a tomom e 36 states e Federal Capital Territory, a nanu Abuja. A tayal a nanu Lagos, a largest city tu Nigeria e a largest metropolitan area tu Africa.
S.PHON: nig…ôria a *…ôd…ôra…≠ r…ôpub…≠i ¶ …ô nig…ôria, pu w…ôst a*ri ¶a. a nanu nu sah…ô…≠ tu nurth …ô gu…≠* u* guin…ôa tu suuth. a tumum …ô ***,*** squar…ô ki…≠um…ôtr…ôs. a pakaw tu *** mi…≠…≠iun a san a pupu…≠uus tu a*ri ¶a, …ô si*th-must pupu…≠uus tu wur…≠d. a nunu nig…ôr tu nurth, ¶had tu nurth…ôast, ¶am…ôruun tu …ôast, …ô b…ônin tu w…ôst. nig…ôria …ô *…ôd…ôra…≠ r…ôpub…≠i ¶ a tumum …ô ** stat…ôs …ô *…ôd…ôra…≠ ¶apita…≠ t…ôrriturj, a nanu abuja. a taja…≠ a nanu …≠agus, a …≠arg…ôst ¶itj tu nig…ôria …ô a …≠arg…ôst m…ôtrupu…≠itan ar…ôa tu a*ri ¶a.
